summary: Session 3 of 3 (FINAL): proved the cold-start chain in both tiers, guarded against re-drift with CI checks, captured operator UAT, and bumped + held the release. (1) Cold-start acceptance test ai_router/tests/test_cold_start_acceptance.py boots a throwaway repo from the committed golden render and walks engine file -> docs/dabbler/start-here.md -> active spec.md -> tier resolved -> the REAL start_session.main() entry point deriving the router mode from tier: (routed for Full, --no-router for Lightweight) -> close via the shared gate, for both tiers. (2) Golden render snapshot coldStartSnapshot.test.ts renders the writer output for both tiers and byte-compares to committed test-fixtures/cold-start/ goldens (UPDATE_GOLDEN=1 regenerates); one artifact set, checked from TS (writer emits it) and Python (it boots). (3) CI drift guards ai_router/scripts/drift_guard.py (unpackaged; PyPI surface unchanged) + 19 tests: stale-framing guard (banned 'no Python/no venv/docs-only' phrasing; auditable file-allowlisted allow-marker escape hatch), one-active-set guard (<=1 in-progress, D6), dist-bundle-in-sync guard (committed dist byte-matches canonical source, D8). Wired into .github/workflows/test.yml as a drift-guards job + a template-snapshot job enforcing the golden. (4) Operator UAT checklist (14 items, ad-hoc/per-set) for the end-to-end Get Started -> scaffold -> 'start the next session' flow on both tiers. (5) Extension 0.27.0 -> 0.28.0 (package.json + lock + CHANGELOG); repository-reference.md release-status + version-walk updated. No PyPI bump (ai_router packaged surface unchanged; 0.16.0 from Set 057 remains held). Python 1184 passed/1 skipped; TS 638 passing (2 pre-existing Set-026 stub failures, untouched files); vsce ls confirms dist/templates ships; drift_guard exits 0.
verification_notes: gpt-5-4 cross-provider, 3 rounds (~$0.439 total). R1 = ISSUES_FOUND with 4 findings; 3 fixed in-flight with regression tests: (F1) the D8 snapshot was local-only -> added a CI 'template-snapshot' job running the writer/golden specs directly (avoids the 2 pre-existing Set-026 spec failures); (F2) the cold-start test only resolved tier and used register_session_start -> rewrote it to drive the real start_session.main() entry (package-qualified import so the production relative import resolves), asserting tier drives the mode via is_no_router_mode(), plus corrected an overclaiming comment; (F3) the allow-region escape hatch was unrestricted -> added ALLOWED_MARKER_FILES so a marker in any other file is itself a violation and does not suppress the banned phrase. (F4) full repository-reference.md staleness (retired Provider Queues/Heartbeats, TreeDataProvider view, obsolete state derivation) was DEFERRED as pre-existing and outside S3's release-status scope; R2 verifier confirmed the deferral reasonable. R2 returned two follow-ups (read the mode through the same ai_router.runtime_mode object the entry mutates; docstring said 'two files' but the allowlist has three) -> both applied. R3 (final) returned all 'Issue: None' = VERIFIED. Raw verdicts preserved in s3-verification.md / -round-2.md / -round-3.md.
